title: Metro STC Pack - MTR/NTE RP
description: This resource pack is an add-on for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod with NTE mod. It adds Mexico City Metro trains in the game. (⚠ Not affiliated with any real brand displayed in the pack)
body:
# 🇲🇽 Metro STC Trains
## **NTE Required**

This resourcepack contains:
- **MP68 series**:
  - Original orange livery
  - Original orange livery (Presidential train)
  - Orange livery

- **NM73 series**:
  - Original train front (Gray/orange livery)
  - CAF train front (Gray/orange livery)
  - CAF train front (Gray/orange livery, recovered by STC workers)
  - CAF train front (Orange livery)
  - CAF train front (Green/orange livery)

- **NC82 series**:
  - Orange livery
  - Green/orange livery

- **NE92 series**:
  - Orange livery

You're **allowed** to modify it, use it in modpack or in servers.
